content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift:12-19 implements a custom star-rating gate that routes only ≥4-star users to the App Store write-review URL (itms-apps://...write-review) while diverting lower ratings to a feedback form, and description.txt:1 explicitly begs "rate us 5 stars!"

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or filtering users based on their rating before directing them to the App Store, and requires use of `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` rather than deep-linking to a write-review URL — this app does neither correctly. This is a textbook 5.6.1/5.6.3 dark pattern combined with incentivized-review copy in the metadata, both of which are common rejection reasons. Replace the custom gate with the system `requestReview()` API shown to all users equally, remove the sentiment-based routing, and drop the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
